A.order: One whole Margherita and one whole Pepperoni Classic, please!
Could I have a Meat Feast and a Veggie Supreme for our table?
A.kinds: whole Meat Feast; whole Veggie Supreme
A.teaches: two named recipes on separate pizzas

A.order: Please make one BBQ Chicken pizza and one Hawaiian pizza.
I would like a Cheesy Cheese Dream with a Dragon's Breath, thanks!
A.kinds: whole Cheesy Cheese Dream; whole Dragon's Breath

A.order: Make me one pizza with cheese base and no toppings, and one whole Pepperoni Classic.
A.kinds: whole cheese base with no toppings; whole Pepperoni Classic
A.teaches: plain whole pizza plus named recipe

A.order: One tomato-base pizza with only mushrooms, and one tomato-base pizza with only olives, please.
A.kinds: whole tomato base with mushroom; whole tomato base with olive

A.order: May I get a whole Gone Bananas and a whole Popeye Power-Up?
A.kinds: whole Gone Bananas; whole Popeye Power-Up

A.order: For me, a Margherita; for my friend, a BBQ Chicken.
A.teaches: assigning one whole order to each board

A.order: Please build one Lunchbox Tragedy and one Veggie Supreme.
A.kinds: whole Lunchbox Tragedy; whole Veggie Supreme
A.teaches: two named recipes with different topping groups

A.order: I need one whole tomato-base pizza with pepperoni, and one whole bbq-base pizza with chicken.
A.kinds: whole tomato base with pepperoni; whole bbq base with chicken
A.teaches: matching base and topping on two whole pizzas

A.order: Could you do a Hawaiian pizza and a Cheesy Cheese Dream pizza?
A.kinds: whole Hawaiian; whole Cheesy Cheese Dream
A.teaches: recognizing two recipe names in one sentence

A.order: One pizza should be half Margherita and half Pepperoni Classic; the other should be a whole Meat Feast.
A.kinds: half Margherita and half Pepperoni Classic; whole Meat Feast
A.teaches: simple halves plus one whole pizza

A.order: Please make one whole Popeye Power-Up, plus one pizza that is half Hawaiian and half BBQ Chicken.
A.kinds: whole Popeye Power-Up; half Hawaiian and half BBQ Chicken
A.teaches: whole pizza and half-and-half recipe matching

A.order: I'll take one whole tomato-base pizza with sweetcorn, and one whole cheese-base pizza with extra cheese.
A.kinds: whole tomato base with sweetcorn; whole cheese base with extra cheese

A.order: Today I'd like a Dragon's Breath and a Gone Bananas, both as whole pizzas.
A.kinds: whole Dragon's Breath; whole Gone Bananas
A.teaches: two whole named pizzas with clear board separation
